title: Study on anti-infrared performance of organohalogen polymer smoke agent
snippet: Presented herein is an experimental study on the organohalogen polymer smoke agent. In smoke box experiment, the transmittance of smoke agent at 3-5 μm and 8-14 μm was used as the index, the effects of each factor on the anti-infrared performance of smoke agent were analyzed by orthogonal test method. The results showed that the main factors affecting the extinction properties of the organohalogen polymer smoke agent in the infrared band were zinc magnesium mass ratios of Zn-Mg alloy powders, Pa
